seo_title: The Well | Minimalist Wellness Retreat in Palm Springs
seo_description: Where minimalism feels like a hug. 1-bedroom wellness retreat in Palm Springs with clean lines, warm wood, teal velvet couch. Visual rest for design lovers sensitive to overwhelm. Book direct, save 15%.
tagline: Where minimalism feels like a hug.
description_heading: Settle In. Clear Your Head. Leave Feeling Well.
description_p1: The Well at Palm Springs was designed for the traveler who needs a stay that functions like home and delivers on it. Whether you're here for extended work, working remotely by intention, or simply seeking a healthy work-play balance in a place that doesn't feel like a hotel: The Well provides a clean, grounded, and genuinely motivating base. From the moment you arrive, you can settle in with ease. No brainwork required.
description_p2: The design does the work for you. Southwestern minimalism executed through mid-century modern furnishings and Navaho pattern work: clean backdrops, meditative line motifs, quality goods chosen to stand out rather than fill space. Thoughtful grounding design details and smart storage guide organization so your environment stays clear. An airy space that promotes clear headspace. The kind of considered, well-made space you'd want to have people over in.
description_p3: One bedroom. Sleeps two. The kitchen is stocked and functional: real home cooking territory. House slippers cushion your feet on tiled flooring. A curated local restaurant guide doubles as a cookbook inspired by Palm Springs favorites. Smart storage keeps everything organized and accessible. The outdoor space is yours for weekend exploring or inviting guests to share a meal under the desert sky.
description_p4: Every guest of The Well at Palm Springs leaves saying this was a pleasantly memorable stay that left them feeling well: not just rested, but clear-headed, grounded, and better for having been here.
